news.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
news.snippet: This new model shows improved reasoning, scoring significantly higher on complex problem-solving benchmarks. It's designed for tasks needing advanced reasoning, like synthesizing data or explaining complex topics.

tech.title: Building an AI agent from scratch in Python
tech.snippet: A tutorial on building a simple AI agent that can use tools to answer questions in a multi-turn conversation, implementing a calculator tool and agent class.
